commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And I that am the LORD your God from the land of Egypt will yet make you to dwell in tents, as in the days of the appointed feast. At Sinai the covenant between God and Israel was chiefly ratified. The former ceased not to perform the conditions, but the latter repaid him with ingratitude. The people shall be brought back, (Calmet) or they shall again be forced to dwell under tents. (Theodoret) "Shall I still cause. "(Tournemine).
